name: ossystems-commit
description: Create conventional commits for staged changes

codexInterface.shortDescription: Create or amend conventional commits from staged changes.
codexInterface.longDescription: Reviews staged git changes and chooses whether to create, split, amend, or fix up a commit while preserving clean project history.
defaultPrompt: Write a conventional commit for the staged diff.
Decide whether these staged changes should amend HEAD.

skills.name: commit
skills.description: Use when the user asks to commit staged changes or draft a commit message.
skills.title: commit
